allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add document review system, COGS reports, and inventory tracker

- Document review UI with forms for PO, packing lists, sales reports, and settlements
- COGS analysis with product and show profitability views
- Inventory tracker with balance and movements views
- Parse, post, and reject API endpoints for document workflow
- Tour-related APIs for shows, POs, COGS, and inventory data
- Auto-redirect from upload to review page
- Ghost 2025 tour seed data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
